label: Preview & Compliance
description: Order preview grid and pre-trade compliance checks with pass/fail badges before submission.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all widgets globally in widget-wrapper.tsx — confirmed present.

0.4.note: No `any` types or @ts-ignore in widget file.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file. All data sourced from useBookTradeData() context hook.

0.6.note: complianceLoading drives Spinner and Checking... button label during compliance run. orderState machine covers all async phases (idle / preview / submitting / success / error).

0.7.note: orderState === 'idle' renders guidance text 'Preview summary and compliance appear after you run Preview Order.' — clear empty/initial state.

0.8.note: orderState === 'error' renders a rose error banner with errorMessage from context, plus a Retry button that transitions back to 'preview'.

0.9.note: No commented-out code, dead branches, or unreachable stubs found.

l0.notes: All 9 L0 checks pass. No fixes required. State machine (idle → preview → submitting → success/error) is complete and clean.

1.1.note: All data (executionMode, complianceResult, complianceLoading, compliancePassed, canExecute, handleSubmit, etc.) sourced exclusively via useBookTradeData(). No inline fetch or direct imports.

1.2.note: book-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() and syncs org/client/strategyId into the form state via useEffect hooks (lines 154–170).

1.3.note: When org filter changes, orgId is set from globalScope.organizationIds[0]; orgId appears in the summary grid, and the order payload uses it for portfolio_id scoping.

1.4.note: clientId syncs from globalScope.clientIds[0] via useEffect and is surfaced in the summary grid and order payload.

1.5.note: strategyId syncs from globalScope.strategyIds[0] via useEffect; shown conditionally in summary and passed in pre-trade check and order payload.

1.6.note: Empty scope arrays leave org/client/strategy fields at default empty strings — the form still works; pre-trade check omits strategy_id when set to 'manual'.

1.7.note: Widget itself imports no reference data. BOOK_CATEGORY_LABELS and categoryLabels come from lib/config/services/trading.config via context. Context-level MOCK_TRADES import from lib/mocks/ is a known context gap (flagged as known issue) — out of scope for widget file.

l1.notes: Data flow is clean. Context correctly reads global scope and cascades org → client → strategy into the preview summary and submission payload. 1.7 context note: MOCK_TRADES in book-data-context.tsx still references lib/mocks/ — flagged as known issue for context-level cleanup.

knownIssues.note: book-data-context.tsx imports MOCK_TRADES from lib/mocks/fixtures/book-trades and merges it with ledger trades. Reference trade data should eventually move to lib/config/ or a proper seed file. Context file is out of scope for widget certification fixes.

book-data-context.tsx references undeclared variable `algoType` at line 345 inside handleSubmit (uses `algoType || null` for non-DeFi algo_type). This is in the read-only context file — not a widget-file issue but should be fixed in a context audit.
